signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs, Fueling XRP's April 2026 Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs, Fueling XRP's April 2026 Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The U.S. SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as resolved, removing a major regulatory overhang and driving XRP's ~10% weekly gain to ~$1.42, with analysts citing it as a fundamental shift enabling institutional adoption and price targets up to $5[1][4].
